metadata.title: AI Toolbox - Discover the Best AI Tools
metadata.description: Curated collection of the world's best AI tools, including AI chat, AI art, AI writing, AI video, coding assistants, and more. Find the right AI assistant to boost your productivity.

hero.title: Discover the Best
hero.subtitle: Curated AI tools to boost your productivity

footer.description: Curated AI tools to boost your productivity
footer.disclaimer: All tool links are for reference only. Please refer to the official website for accurate information.

chatgpt.description: OpenAI's AI chat model, powerful and supports multi-turn conversations
chatgpt.fullDescription: ChatGPT is a large language model developed by OpenAI, capable of natural language conversations, answering questions, assisting with writing, programming help, and more. Supports GPT-3.5 and GPT-4 models.

claude.description: Anthropic's AI assistant, excels at long text processing and code generation
claude.fullDescription: Claude is an AI assistant developed by Anthropic, known for its strong reasoning capabilities and long text processing. Supports file upload analysis and has strong code writing abilities.

kimi.description: Moonshot AI's flagship product, supports ultra-long context, excellent domestic AI
kimi.fullDescription: Kimi is a domestic large model developed by Moonshot AI, supporting 2 million character超长上下文, excelling in document understanding, summary generation, and multi-turn conversations.

doubao.description: ByteDance's AI assistant, free and smooth experience
doubao.fullDescription: Doubao is an AI assistant launched by ByteDance, offering a smooth dialogue experience, supporting multimodal interactions, and completely free.

midjourney.description: Industry-leading AI art tool, best for artistic creation
midjourney.fullDescription: Midjourney is one of the most popular AI art generation tools, known for its excellent artistic style and detail representation. Generates high-quality images through Discord.

stable-diffusion.description: Open source AI painting model, free and customizable
stable-diffusion.fullDescription: Stable Diffusion is an open-source AI image generation model that can be run locally or in the cloud, supporting various style adjustments and fine-tuning models.

github-copilot.description: GitHub's AI programming assistant, improves coding efficiency
github-copilot.fullDescription: GitHub Copilot is an AI programming assistant developed by GitHub and OpenAI, providing code suggestions, autocomplete, and code generation based on context.

cursor.fullDescription: Cursor is an AI-native code editor built on VS Code, deeply integrated with AI capabilities, supporting code generation, refactoring, and intelligent Q&A.

suno.description: AI music generation tool, creates songs from text
suno.fullDescription: Suno is an AI music generation tool that can create complete songs with lyrics and melody from text descriptions, supporting various music styles.

runway.description: AI video generation and editing platform
runway.fullDescription: Runway is a powerful AI video creation platform, offering video generation, editing, special effects, and other features, a powerful tool for creators.

notion-ai.description: Notion's AI assistant, improves writing efficiency
notion-ai.fullDescription: Notion AI is the AI feature built into Notion, helping users write, summarize, translate, and brainstorm, enhancing document processing efficiency.

gamma.description: AI PPT generation tool, creates beautiful presentations
gamma.fullDescription: Gamma is an AI presentation tool that generates beautiful slides from text descriptions, supporting real-time collaboration and rich multimedia embedding.

canva.description: Online design tool with rich templates
canva.fullDescription: Canva is an easy-to-use online design platform offering a large number of templates, suitable for social media, presentations, posters, and other design needs.

removebg.description: AI background removal tool, one-click transparent background
removebg.fullDescription: Remove.bg is a professional AI background removal tool that automatically identifies subjects and removes backgrounds, supporting hair-level detail processing.

deepseek.description: DeepSeek's large language model, excellent reasoning ability
deepseek.fullDescription: DeepSeek is a large language model developed by DeepSeek, with strong reasoning and code generation capabilities, completely free to use.

liblibai.description: Domestic AI art platform, rich model library
liblibai.fullDescription: LiblibAI is a domestic AI art platform with a rich model library, supporting various painting styles, suitable for beginners and professionals.

hailuoai.description: MiniMax's AI video generation tool, natural motion
hailuoai.fullDescription: HailuoAI is an AI video generation tool launched by MiniMax, featuring natural motion effects, suitable for short video creation.

pika.description: AI video generation tool, fast video creation
pika.fullDescription: Pika is an AI video generation platform that can create short videos from text or images, simple and easy to use.

pixverse.description: AI video generation platform, rich effects
pixverse.fullDescription: PixVerse is an AI video generation platform offering various visual effects and style options, suitable for creative video production.

luma.description: AI 3D model generation tool from images
luma.fullDescription: Luma AI is a tool that generates 3D models from images, using Neural Radiance Fields technology to create high-quality 3D assets.

elevenlabs.fullDescription: ElevenLabs is a professional AI voice synthesis platform offering high-quality text-to-speech services, supporting multiple languages and voice cloning.

heygen.description: AI digital human video generation platform
heygen.fullDescription: HeyGen is an AI digital human video generation platform that can create videos with virtual hosts from text, suitable for marketing and education.

chatglm.description: Zhipu AI's large model, bilingual in Chinese and English
chatglm.fullDescription: ChatGLM is a large language model developed by Zhipu AI, supporting Chinese and English dialogue, with open-source versions available.

wenxinyiyan.description: Baidu's AI assistant, powerful knowledge Q&A
wenxinyiyan.fullDescription: Wenxin Yiyan is an AI assistant launched by Baidu, based on the Wenxin large model, excelling in Chinese knowledge Q&A.

tongyiqianwen.description: Alibaba's large model, supports multiple scenarios
tongyiqianwen.fullDescription: Tongyi Qianwen is a large language model launched by Alibaba, supporting various application scenarios such as dialogue, writing, and programming.

xinghuo.description: iFlytek's AI assistant, strong Chinese capabilities
xinghuo.fullDescription: Xinghuo is an AI assistant launched by iFlytek, with strong Chinese language understanding and voice interaction capabilities.

wanxiang.description: Alibaba's AI art tool, excellent Chinese understanding
wanxiang.fullDescription: Tongyi Wanxiang is an AI art tool launched by Alibaba, with the best Chinese prompt understanding and completely free to use.

jimeng.description: ByteDance's AI art tool, integrated with TikTok
jimeng.fullDescription: Jimeng is an AI art and video tool launched by ByteDance, deeply integrated with the TikTok ecosystem, supporting various creative styles.

miaoying.description: Meitu's AI art tool, beautiful style
miaoying.fullDescription: Miaoying is an AI art tool launched by Meitu, generating exquisite images with beautiful style and smooth experience.

cutout.description: PicUP.AI's AI art platform, rich features
cutout.fullDescription: Cutout is a professional AI art platform launched by PicUP.AI, offering various art generation and image processing functions.

copyai.description: AI copywriting tool, marketing copywriting assistant
copyai.fullDescription: Copy.ai is an AI writing tool specifically designed for marketing copywriting, helping users quickly generate advertising copy, social media content, etc.

jasper.fullDescription: Jasper is an enterprise-grade AI writing platform offering professional content generation and marketing copywriting services.

writesonic.fullDescription: Writesonic is an AI writing tool focused on SEO content generation, helping users create search-engine-optimized articles.

xiaofeng.fullDescription: Xiaofeng is an AI writing tool launched by iFlytek, specializing in Chinese writing assistance, supporting multiple document types.

wenshumaoxie.description: Secretary's AI writing tool, suitable for Chinese
wenshumaoxie.fullDescription: Wenshu Maoxie is an AI writing tool under Secretary, offering Chinese writing assistance, supporting polishing, expansion, and rewriting functions.

yijian.description: YiJian AI's writing tool, easy to use
yijian.fullDescription: Yijian AI Writing is an AI writing assistant under YiJian AI, offering various writing templates and style options.

aizhichi.description: AI paper writing tool, academic assistant
aizhichi.fullDescription: AI Zhichi is an AI tool focused on academic paper writing, offering paper structuring, polishing, and formatting functions.

tabnine.description: AI code completion tool, supports multiple languages
tabnine.fullDescription: Tabnine is an AI programming assistant supporting various IDEs and programming languages, offering intelligent code completion.

codeium.fullDescription: Codeium is a completely free AI programming assistant, offering code completion, generation, and explanation functions.

trae.description: ByteDance's free AI editor, domestic alternative
trae.fullDescription: Trae is an AI programming editor launched by ByteDance, completely free, a domestic alternative to Cursor.

marsCode.fullDescription: MarsCode is an AI programming assistant launched by ByteDance, supporting code completion, generation, and explanation functions.

codewhisperer.fullDescription: CodeWhisperer is an AI programming assistant launched by Amazon, offering code suggestions and security scanning.

v0.fullDescription: v0 is an AI UI generation tool launched by Vercel, capable of generating React components from text descriptions.

bolt.description: StackBlitz's AI programming tool, full-stack generation
bolt.fullDescription: Bolt.new is an AI programming tool launched by StackBlitz, capable of generating full-stack applications from text.

loveshot.fullDescription: Loveshot is a domestic AI image generation platform, offering various style options and fine-tuning models.

mewxai.description: Domestic AI art tool, beautiful style
mewxai.fullDescription: MewXAI is a domestic AI art platform, offering exquisite art generation and image processing functions.

qqny.fullDescription: QQNY is an AI companion application launched by Tencent, offering virtual character dialogue and interactive experiences.

tencent-yuanbao.fullDescription: Tencent Yuanbao is an AI assistant launched by Tencent, based on the Hunyuan large model, with strong Chinese dialogue capabilities.

mita.fullDescription: Mita is an AI companion application launched by MiniMax, offering virtual character dialogue and emotional companionship.

moyu.fullDescription: Moyu is an AI companion application launched by INSCAPE, creating virtual characters for interactive experiences.

flow.fullDescription: Coze (Flow) is an AI application development platform launched by ByteDance, allowing users to quickly build AI applications and bots.

dify.description: Open source LLM application development platform
dify.fullDescription: Dify is an open-source LLM application development platform, supporting rapid construction of AI applications and workflows.

fastgpt.description: Open source AI knowledge base platform
fastgpt.fullDescription: FastGPT is an open-source AI knowledge base platform based on LLM, supporting rapid construction of knowledge base Q&A systems.

maxkb.description: Open source knowledge base Q&A system
maxkb.fullDescription: MaxKB is an open-source knowledge base Q&A system based on large models, suitable for enterprise knowledge management.

langchain.fullDescription: LangChain is a popular LLM application development framework, offering rich tools and components for building AI applications.

ollama.fullDescription: Ollama is a tool for running large language models locally, supporting various open-source models like Llama, Mistral, etc.

lmstudio.description: Local LLM running and management platform
lmstudio.fullDescription: LM Studio is a local large language model management and running platform, offering a user-friendly interface and rich features.

anythingllm.fullDescription: AnythingLLM is a local AI knowledge base application that can build private knowledge base Q&A systems based on local documents.
